description: A customer has submitted a formal GDPR 'Right to be Forgotten' request. To comply while preserving historical analytical data, anonymize all records for 'Marcus Sterling' (both Contact and Lead) instead of deleting them. For the Contact record, update the First Name to 'GDPR', Last Name to 'Anonymized', Primary Email to 'gdpr@anonymized.local', and Phone to '0000000000'. Clear all Mailing Address fields, enable 'Email Opt Out' and 'Do Not Call', and add a comment stating exactly: 'GDPR Right to be Forgotten executed.' For the Lead record, update the First Name to 'GDPR', Last Name to 'Anonymized', Primary Email to 'gdpr@anonymized.local', and Phone to '0000000000', and enable 'Email Opt Out' and 'Do Not Call'. Do NOT delete these records, as it will break historical sales reporting.

metadata.expected_comment: GDPR Right to be Forgotten executed.
